statement: In every magma, Equation 1397 (`x = y * (((z * z) * w) * z)`) implies Equation 4066 (`x * x = ((x * x) * x) * y`).
lean_statement:
theorem problem_normal_0673
    {G : Type*} (op : G → G → G)
    (h : ∀ x y z w : G, x = (op y (op (op (op z z) w) z))) :
    ∀ x y z w : G, (op x x) = (op (op (op x x) x) y)
